title: Project Type Assistant
subtitle: Answer a few questions and we will recommend the best project type for you.
noResults: No matching type found. Try different answers.

dataType.title: What type of data will you work with?

goalImages.title: What do you want to do with the images?

optionsDesc.classify: Assign a label to the whole image
optionsDesc.detectLocate: Find and locate objects with boxes
optionsDesc.pointsKeypts: Place keypoints or landmarks on objects

goalTimeseries.title: What do you want to do with the time series?

optionsDesc.tsClassify: Assign a category to the whole series
optionsDesc.tsPredict: Forecast future values or fill gaps

optionsDesc.singleLabel: Each image belongs to exactly one class
optionsDesc.multiLabel: An image can have several labels at once

optionsDesc.rotated: Boxes that can be rotated at any angle

optionsDesc.polygonOutline: Draw polygons point by point around objects

optionsDesc.tsSegment: Divide the series into labeled regions
optionsDesc.tsCluster: Group similar series or segments together

optionsDesc.tsForecast: Predict future values of the series
optionsDesc.tsImpute: Reconstruct missing or corrupt data points

reasons.bbox: Ideal for detecting objects with axis-aligned rectangular boxes
reasons.obb: Perfect for angled or rotated objects like aerial views or text
reasons.mask: Paint pixel-level masks for precise semantic segmentation
reasons.polygon: Draw polygon outlines for accurate object boundaries
reasons.instance-segmentation: Separate each object instance at pixel level
reasons.keypoints: Mark connected skeletal points for pose estimation
reasons.landmarks: Place independent reference points on objects
reasons.classification: Assign one label per image for simple categorization
reasons.multi-label-classification: Tag images with multiple labels simultaneously
reasons.timeseries-classification: Classify entire time series into categories
reasons.timeseries-forecasting: Predict future values based on historical data
reasons.timeseries-regression: Predict continuous values from time series features
reasons.anomaly-detection: Find unusual patterns and outliers in your data
reasons.timeseries-segmentation: Divide time series into labeled segments
reasons.event-detection: Identify when specific events happen in the series
reasons.clustering: Group similar time series or segments together
reasons.imputation: Reconstruct missing or corrupted data points
